text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Mejiro Ryan hears rumors about Mejiro
McQueen being in poor condition, she rushes to
see her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But McQueen ignores Ryan's concerns and claims
to be in perfect condition. To prove it, she
challenges Ryan to a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan accepts and then learns firsthand of
McQueen's overwhelming aptitude for
long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She grows impatient upon seeing the momentum
McQueen has gained toward the spring Tenno
Sho awaiting them after the Classics.
